name: Ruinscape
short_description: Dive into the mysteries of an abandoned castle, explore its ruins, and uncover treasures that reveal stories of the past. Serene medieval music sets the tone for a timeless journey through the ages.
detailed_description:
Step into the ruins of an ancient castle, where every place whispers secrets of a long-lost era.

Key Features:

  • Puzzles: Solve puzzles to unlock doors, discover hidden pathways, and piece together the story of the castle's past.

  • Hidden Treasures: Find chests filled with trinkets and artifacts, each revealing clues about the lives of those who once called this place home.

  • Storytelling: Experience a rich narrative through short notes and relics scattered throughout the castle. Uncover a tale of betrayal, loss, and forgotten glory.

  • Achievements and Progression: Earn unique Steam achievements by unlocking every door, solving every puzzle, and collecting every hidden treasure.

  • Immersive Soundtrack: Enjoy the soothing blend of tranquil Medieval music and ambient nature sounds that accompany your journey through time.

Gameplay Overview:

The game focuses on exploration and discovery, rewarding curiosity and attention to detail. Players will navigate the ruins and find treasures. The game invites players to piece together the full story through short narrative notes and meaningful treasures.

This game offers an atmospheric walk through the ruins of a forgotten castle, where you can explore, solve puzzles, and collect items.

supported_languages: English, French, Ukrainian, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Hindi, Korean
